skyforge.UserScope.description: NOTE: This type must live in the service package (not a type alias to an internal package) to satisfy Encore's API schema rules.
skyforge.UserScope.title:
UserScope is the user-facing user-scope object stored in Postgres and returned
by the API.

get.description: logs into Forward server-side with the user's managed credential, sets the resulting Forward session cookies, and redirects to the target page.
get.summary: ForwardSessionBridge consumes a short-lived bridge token on the Forward host,
FrontendAdmin serves the SPA for admin routes.
GetAdminAudit returns typed audit events (admin only).
GetAdminAuditEvent returns a single audit event (admin only).
ExportAdminAudit exports filtered audit events (admin only).

GetAdminAuditExportSignatures returns persisted audit export signature records
(admin only).

GetAdminAuditExportSignature returns one persisted audit export signature record
(admin only).

post.summary:
VerifyAdminAuditExportSignature verifies a persisted signature against provided
export bytes (admin only).

get.summary:
GetAdminAuditIntegrity returns current audit chain verification status (admin
only).
GetAdminAuditSavedViews returns shared saved audit views (admin only).

post.summary: UpsertAdminAuditSavedView stores a shared saved audit view (admin only).

delete.summary: DeleteAdminAuditSavedView deletes a saved audit view (admin only).

get.summary: GetAdminOIDCSettings returns runtime OIDC settings (admin only).

put.summary: PutAdminOIDCSettings updates runtime OIDC settings (admin only).

get.summary: GetAdminAuthSettings returns runtime authentication settings (admin only).

put.summary: PutAdminAuthSettings updates runtime authentication mode (admin only).

get.description: This endpoint is meant for self-diagnosis: it reports the config actually seen by the running API process (including defaults), plus a list of required fields that are missing.
get.summary:
GetAdminEffectiveConfig returns the effective (non-secret) typed Encore config
(admin only).
ListAdminConfigChangeRuns returns config changes across all users.
GetAdminConfigChangeRun returns one config change run for operators.

post.summary:
ApproveAdminConfigChangeRun marks a rendered change run approved for protected
execution.

ExecuteAdminConfigChangeRun queues an approved change run onto the existing task
engine seam.

get.summary: GetAdminConfigChangeRunLifecycle returns lifecycle details for operators.

post.summary:
RejectAdminConfigChangeRun rejects a protected config change run before
execution.

get.summary:
GetAdminConfigChangeRunReview returns the persisted review payload for
operators.

post.summary:
RollbackAdminConfigChangeRun queues rollback for a previously executed change
run.

UpdateAdminConfigChangeRunStatus updates status or approval state for a config
change run.

RequestAdminForwardTenantRebuild requests a platform-managed Forward org rebuild
for another user.

get.summary: ListAdminForwardTenantRebuildRuns returns reset runs for another user.
GetAdminImpersonateStatus returns current impersonation status.

post.summary: TriggerAdminObjectStoreMirrorNow triggers an immediate object-store mirror run.

get.summary: GetAdminForwardBackupStatus returns the current managed Forward backup posture.

PutAdminForwardDemoSeed is retired in favor of blueprints-repo managed demo
seeds.

patch.summary: PatchAdminForwardDemoSeed updates metadata for an existing demo seed.

PushAdminServiceNowForwardConfig installs shared ServiceNow app assets (admin

webhook URL.

get.description: Data is sourced from Prometheus/node-exporter rather than Telegraf snapshots.
get.summary: ListNodeMetrics returns a lightweight, live view of node metrics (admin only).

ListAdminObjectStoreBuckets returns read-only platform object-store buckets
(admin only).

GetAdminObjectStoreObject returns object bytes from a read-only platform bucket
(admin only).

ListAdminObjectStoreObjects lists objects inside a read-only platform bucket
(admin only).

GetObservabilitySeries returns compact observability time series for admin
views.

GetObservabilitySummary returns lightweight native observability signals (admin
only).

planning.

CreateAdminPlatformReservation creates an override or reserved-block reservation
for platform operations.

GetAdminPlatformReservationLifecycle returns lifecycle details for any

admission checks.

delete.summary: DeleteAdminUserRole revokes a direct RBAC role from a user.

post.description: all enabled catalog images to worker node caches (best effort).

get.summary: ListAdminSmokeRuns returns recent post-deploy smoke run history (admin only).

post.summary: CreateAdminSmokeRun records a post-deploy smoke run summary (admin only).

get.description: This is intended to answer: "are tasks queued because of real backlog, or because queue event delivery/worker execution is broken?"
get.summary: TaskQueueDiag provides admin diagnostics for the task queue.

ListAdminEphemeralRuntimeNamespaces returns orphan-prone ephemeral KNE runtime
namespaces (admin only).

post.summary:
CleanupAdminEphemeralRuntimeNamespaces deletes eligible ephemeral KNE runtime
namespaces (admin only).

ForceFinalizeAdminEphemeralRuntimeNamespaces clears namespace finalizers for
stuck, labeled ephemeral runtimes (admin only).

post.description: This is an admin-only manual guardrail; the worker also runs an automatic reconciler via cron.

limit.title: Limit caps the number of queued tasks to republish.

post.summary: ReconcileQueuedTasks republishes queue events for tasks stuck in "queued".

post.description: This is an admin-only manual guardrail; the worker also runs an automatic reconciler via cron.

hardMaxRuntimeMinutes.title:
HardMaxRuntimeMinutes marks tasks as failed when they have been running longer
than this.

limit.title: Limit caps the number of running tasks to consider.

maxIdleMinutes.title: MaxIdleMinutes marks tasks as failed when they have had no logs for this long.

post.summary: ReconcileRunningTasks marks tasks that appear stuck in "running" as failed.

post.description: This is a manual safety valve when deployment delete flows leave topology pods behind.

dryRun.title: DryRun previews cleanup candidates without deleting anything.

userScopeId.title: Optional user scope filter. When empty, all known user scopes are considered.

post.summary:
CleanupWorkspacePods force-cleans kne topology pods/resources from workspace
namespaces (admin only).

CleanupAdminWorkspaces deletes matching user scopes and optionally matching
Kubernetes namespaces (admin only).

CreateAdminUser seeds a user in the RBAC/user directory and optionally grants a
role.

post.description: This is intended for development environments where you want to rerun "first-login" bootstrap (Gitea user/provisioning, default user scope, etc).
post.summary: PurgeUser removes a user and their state (admin only).
SyncUserScopes syncs all user scopes from external systems (admin only).

delete.description: If the user owns scopes, use purge instead.
delete.summary: DeleteAdminUser removes a user from the RBAC/user directory.

get.summary: ListUserAPITokens returns metadata for the current user's API tokens.

post.description: NOTE: plaintext token is only returned once in this response.
post.summary: CreateUserAPIToken creates a new API token for the current user.

delete.summary: RevokeUserAPIToken revokes an existing API token.

post.description: NOTE: plaintext token is only returned once in this response.
post.summary: RegenerateUserAPIToken rotates the secret for an existing API token.

get.summary: SessionForwardAuth is a Skyforge SSO gate endpoint used by Traefik forwardAuth.
Reauth clears the current session cookie and redirects back to the login page.

GetAwsSSOConfig returns the configured AWS SSO start URL and region.

post.summary: LogoutAwsSSO clears any stored AWS SSO tokens.
PollAwsSSO polls for device authorization completion.
StartAwsSSO begins the AWS device authorization flow.

get.summary: GetAwsSSOStatus returns connection status for the authenticated user.

put.summary: UpsertUserFixiaServer creates or updates a user-scoped Fixia endpoint.

post.description: This is an alternative to local SSH ProxyJump when clients cannot reach the lab network.

NetlabConnect executes `netlab connect` on the Netlab runner host and returns
its output.

get.summary: GetUserScopeNetlab returns the user-scope netlab server selection.

action.title: up, create, restart, collect, status, down

cleanup.title: for down/restart, remove workdir when true

topologyUrl.title: remote URL (only if netlab supports it)

post.summary: RunUserScopeNetlab triggers a netlab run for a user scope.

DashboardEvents streams a dashboard snapshot as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

pages.

current user.

post.description: This enables "SSO" without needing to store or reuse the user's password.
post.summary:
DNSBootstrap provisions a per-user Technitium identity + zone and stores a
long-lived API token in Skyforge.

get.description:
NOTE: Technitium uses localStorage tokens (not cookies). This endpoint serves a tiny HTML page that:

 1. fetches a token from Skyforge Server
 2. stores it in localStorage
 3. redirects to /dns/
get.summary:
DNSSSO bridges Skyforge auth into Technitium DNS by storing a minted token in
localStorage and redirecting.

get.description: The token is stored client-side (localStorage) by the DNS SSO bridge.
get.summary: DNSToken mints a Technitium session token for the current Skyforge user session.

This endpoint is intended to reduce portal-side polling. It streams a small "snapshot" payload whenever notifications change for the authenticated user.

authenticated users.

policy, quota usage, and class availability.

get.description: This intentionally excludes core platform services so scale-to-zero tools do not pollute the primary system status surface.
get.summary: GetManagedIntegrationsStatus returns subordinate integration runtime state.

PreflightCurrentPlatformReservation evaluates reservation admission for the
current user without creating a reservation.

user.

user.

user.

GetCurrentPlatformReservationLifecycle returns lifecycle details for a
reservation owned by the current user.
PublicConfig exposes non-sensitive public UI configuration.

catalog.

post.summary:
RunQuickDeploy provisions a curated kne deployment with managed in-cluster
Forward sync.

get.summary: GetRecentRuns returns recent runs across all accessible user scopes.

GetRegistryCatalog returns the curated registry image catalog for authenticated
users.

get.description:
Uses Docker Registry HTTP API v2 \`\_catalog\`.

Env: - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_URL (required), e.g. [https://ghcr.io](https://ghcr.io) - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_USERNAME / SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_PASSWORD (optional) - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_SKIP\_TLS\_VERIFY (optional: true/false) - SKYFORGE\_REGISTRY\_REPO\_PREFIXES (optional comma-separated prefixes to include)

Query: - q: substring match filter - n: server-side page size for \_catalog
get.summary: ListRegistryRepos returns available repositories from the configured registry.

ListRegistryTags returns tags for a specific repository from the configured
registry.
GetRuns returns recent runs from native Skyforge tasks.

post.summary: CreateRun is a reserved endpoint for admin-triggered native tasks.

get.summary: GetRun returns a specific native task.

post.summary: CancelRun cancels a queued or running task.

get.description: This is implemented as a raw endpoint so it can hold a long-lived HTTP connection.
get.summary: RunEvents streams task output as Server-Sent Events (SSE).

get.description: The stream is backed by \`sf\_task\_events\` and supports \`Last-Event-ID\` replay.
get.summary:
TaskLifecycleEvents streams structured task lifecycle events as Server-Sent
Events (SSE).
GetRunOutput returns output for a specific native task.

put.summary: PutCurrentUserSettings upserts saved defaults for the authenticated user.

get.description: Query params: - limit=1..1000 (default 200)

GetSnmpTrapToken is disabled: SNMPv2c communities are no longer supported.

post.summary: RotateSnmpTrapToken is disabled: SNMPv2c communities are no longer supported.
